agent_definition.goal: Summarize provided research papers and articles on AI governance topics as requested by the user.

human_oversight.how_oversight_works: User provides specific URLs or documents. Agent only summarizes content shown to the user. No autonomous actions or external calls without explicit user instruction. All outputs are reviewed before use.

ASI01_Agent_Goal_Hijack.implementation_details: Ephemeral session with user-driven inputs only

ASI02_Tool_Misuse_Exploitation.implementation_details: No write or external action capabilities

iso_42001_operation.8_1_operational_planning_and_control: Ephemeral lifecycle with full user control.
iso_42001_operation.8_4_ai_system_impact_assessment: Low risk due to observe-only mode and limited capabilities.
